emails.subject: FW: PG&E/Transwestern Gas Quality Meeting
emails.body: FW: PG&E/Transwestern Gas Quality Meeting Steve, You will be interested in the proposed budget for PG&E's gas quality issue for 2002. Not unexpected. John

emails.subject: RE: PG&E/Transwestern Gas Quality Meeting
emails.body: RE: PG&E/Transwestern Gas Quality Meeting I am sure you all will be reviewing the appropriateness of the numbers, but am am very curious about the $1 miilion or so for the Kern interconnect. Why should we have to pay for that one?

emails.subject: RE: PG&E/Transwestern Gas Quality Meeting
emails.body: I will talk it over with the guys as we work through the numbers. Thanks, John
